source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, given \( U_i = 18V \), and the voltage regulation values of the zener diodes \( V_{Z1} \) and \( V_{Z2} \) are 5V and 10V respectively, the correct analysis is
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Both \( V_{Z1} \) and \( V_{Z2} \) can operate normally

choice_map.B: \( V_{Z1} \) cannot operate normally, \( V_{Z2} \) can operate normally
choice_map.C: Both \( V_{Z1} \) and \( V_{Z2} \) can operate normally
choice_map.D: Neither \( V_{Z1} \) nor \( V_{Z2} \) can operate normally
